title: Visualizing Limit Points and Isolated Points in a Metric Space
description: A Venn diagram showing the relationship between a set A, its limit points, its isolated points, and the overall metric space X.
relationships: p is a limit point if every N(p, ε) contains a point of A different from p
q is an isolated point if there exists an N(q, ε) that contains no other points of A
The set of all limit points of A is called the derived set A'
